name: Blackwing - Sudri the Phantom Glimmer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>耀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のスズリ
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Suðri the Phantom Glimmer
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 card that mentions "Black-Winged Dragon" from your Deck to your hand, except "Blackwing - Sudri the Phantom Glimmer". You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon 1 "Phantom Glimmer Token" (Winged Beast/Tuner/DARK/Level 2/ATK 700/DEF 700), then you take 700 damage. You cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck the turn you activate this effect, except Synchro Monsters. You can only use this effect of "Blackwing - Sudri the Phantom Glimmer" once per turn.

You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon 1 "Phantom Glimmer Token" (Winged Beast/Tuner/DARK/Level 2/ATK 700/DEF 700), then you take 700 damage. sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
